highlights.text: I provided this setup way back on F riday June 20th at 4pm when we were 6020, by stating: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend, until it ends.
My lean is we work back up to 6050, then 6081.

We could fill this out more but the bull case would be this breaks out, and targets 6319, 6325-30…In an “ultra bull case” tomorrow, we won’t even fill this triangle out more and will instead just base out 6311 to 6288, then head up.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “One option I like is a Failed Breakdown of last nights [Thursday 3:15AM] 6288 low.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a quality Failed Breakdown we had on Tuesday evening (where we lost and recovered the Tuesday 6263 daily low), as this setup got us long for the rally into this weeks highs.
I confirmed at the close Wednesday, stating: “ES is building a new triangle 6311 to 6252 now with 6277 magnet.

post_title: SPX Spent This Week Rangebound. Breakout Next Week? July 14 Plan
